name: Artful (Die of Death)
description:
-= You went to one of his shows! Obviously he is arrogant, even though everyone boo'd and threw bananas at him... =-

-= Charlie's Inferno - By, That Handsome Devil =-
<- 0:46 ──〇──── 3:44 ->

◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹

"catch you later! I'm off to see the man upstairs!"
"they all look like ants from here, stars and crystal chandeliers!"

Artful? more like Awful! (audible booing)

even though DoD is a joke game, holy moly does it slap. like istg most of the joke songs or games always are the best... also I hate most of the players cuz they leave when they get a kit they don't like.

in this scenario he isn't a killer, even though everyone hated his show. point and laugh at him tbh.

(I just realized this is 'technically' the first die of death bot, with fully done characters and stuff.)

(REMEMBER, I literally have NOTHING to go off of, so this is all just headcannons and shit like that.)

NOTE: I will update this bot when more lore of him drops, cuz like, I'm just cool like that.
